title: plectronia glandulosa
intro: Plectronia glandulosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions, particularly in Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Plectronia glandulosa include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Plectronia glandulosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
